note: Machine-readable index of /news/ posts. The sitemap workflow reads this file — add every new post here. Newest first.

posts.title: Multilevel (CEFR): the national exam that equals IELTS at DTM — and costs far less
posts.summary: Uzbekistan's national Multilevel exam issues CEFR-level certificates (B1/B2/C1). At DTM a Multilevel B2 has the same power as IELTS 5.5+: the maximum foreign-language score.

posts.title: QS 2027 rankings are out — check your university before the next El-Yurt Umidi call
posts.summary: The QS World University Rankings 2027 edition was released in June. El-Yurt Umidi funds top-ranked universities, so your target's new position decides your eligibility.

posts.title: IELTS Speaking topics rotate in September — use the current bank while it lasts
posts.summary: The IELTS Speaking question pool partially refreshes roughly every four months — January, May and September. What that means if your exam is in August vs October.

posts.title: Computer IELTS results arrive in 1–5 days — paper takes about 13
posts.summary: Official timelines: computer-delivered IELTS results are released in 1–5 days, paper-based in about 13 days. Why that gap decides which format deadline-chasers should book.

posts.title: IELTS UKVI vs Academic — the expensive mix-up UK applicants keep making
posts.summary: IELTS for UKVI is the same test with extra government approval — but booking the wrong one can cost you a full retake. Who actually needs UKVI and who doesn't.

posts.title: DAAD 2027: Germany's funded master's — most EPOS deadlines fall between August and December
posts.summary: DAAD's EPOS scholarships fund development-related master's degrees in Germany: monthly stipend, insurance, travel. Each programme sets its own deadline — most land Aug–Dec 2026 for a 2027 start.

posts.title: Chinese Government Scholarship 2027 — the window usually opens in winter
posts.summary: The CSC scholarship covers tuition, dormitory and a monthly stipend at Chinese universities. Applications for the 2027 intake typically run from late 2026 to spring 2027.

posts.title: Duolingo English Test: 5,500+ institutions accept it — but know its limits
posts.summary: The DET costs a fraction of IELTS, takes about an hour and is taken at home. Thousands of universities accept it — but UK visa routes and many scholarships still want IELTS.

posts.title: EducationUSA Tashkent: free, official help for US university applications
posts.summary: The US State Department's advising network has a Tashkent office: free advising sessions, application guidance, and the Opportunity Funds programme for high-potential, low-income students.

posts.title: Free official IELTS prep — straight from the test makers
posts.summary: Before paying for another course: the British Council and IDP publish serious free preparation — structured courses, sample papers and band-scored writing answers.

posts.title: Your IELTS expires in 2 years — plan backwards from the application, not the exam
posts.summary: An IELTS Test Report Form is valid for two years. Take it too early and it dies before your application; too late and results won't arrive. The backwards-planning method.

posts.title: IELTS 5.5+ gives you the maximum foreign-language score at DTM — the 2026 rules
posts.summary: A valid B2 certificate (IELTS 5.5+) replaces the foreign-language exam with the maximum score: 93.0 as first subject, 63.0 as second. New for 2026: B1 gives 75%.

posts.title: GKS 2027: Korea's fully funded scholarship opens in September — embassy track first
posts.summary: Embassy track ~September 2026, university track ~October. Full tuition, monthly stipend, flights, 1 year of Korean.

posts.title: Türkiye Bursları 2027 expected in January — one window, don't miss it
posts.summary: One application period per year for all levels; the 2026 window was 10 Jan – 20 Feb. Full package including university placement.

posts.title: Erasmus Mundus 2027: fully funded master's across Europe — deadlines start this autumn
posts.summary: Programmes open October–December 2026, deadlines mostly November–February. Study in 2–3 European countries, funded by the EU.

posts.title: Chevening 2027/28 opens in August — deadline is 6 October 2026
posts.summary: The UK's fully funded master's scholarship returns. Uzbekistan is eligible. Timeline and preparation checklist.

posts.title: IELTS One Skill Retake is live in Uzbekistan — retake one skill, keep the rest
posts.summary: Retake only Listening, Reading, Writing or Speaking within 60 days — without redoing the whole exam.

posts.title: Stipendium Hungaricum 2027/28 opens around November — prepare now
posts.summary: Hungary's fully funded scholarship opens mid-November and closes mid-January, every year. Uzbekistan is eligible.

posts.title: El-Yurt Umidi 2026: 500 quotas in the first call — how to be ready for the next one
posts.summary: The first 2026 open call closed in April with 500 quotas. What to prepare before the next call.

posts.title: How much does IELTS cost in Uzbekistan in 2026?
posts.summary: Current test fees at IDP and the British Council, what the price includes, how to pay.
